title: Principal Frontend Developer at Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions!
